about.title: Who Are We
about.subtitle: The Heart of Storytelling
about.heroText: We are not just a platform; we are a universe where every writer finds their world, and every story finds its wings.
about.storyContent:
Hekayaty didn’t start as just a platform…
It started as a belief.

A belief that stories in the Arab world deserve more.
More reach. More power. More life.

Behind this vision were two individuals:
MN and AH.

Not just partners… but best friends.

MN was the dreamer — the one who saw beyond reality.
The one who didn’t just build a platform,
but created worlds… stories… emotions.

He was the mind behind the ideas,
the creator of the songs, the music,
the cinematic vision of Hekayaty.

Every beat, every concept, every experience…
started from imagination and turned into something real.

But no dream survives alone.

That’s where AH comes in.

AH wasn’t just a partner.
He was the one who believed — from day one.

When things were uncertain… he stayed.
When the vision was still just an idea… he saw it.
And until today… he’s still standing beside it.

Together, they didn’t just build a project.

They built something bigger than themselves.

A place where writers are no longer invisible.
A place where stories are not just written…
but experienced, shared, and transformed into something powerful.

Hekayaty is not just a platform.

It’s a universe.
A movement.
A new beginning for every storyteller who was once unheard.

And this… is only the beginning.
about.missionContent: To empower every writer, storyteller, and creator in the Arab world with the tools, community, and platform they need to share their unique vision with the world.
about.offerPublishingDesc: A premium reading and writing experience designed for long-form immersion.
about.offerMarketplaceDesc: Sell physical books, ebooks, and creative assets directly to your fans.
about.offerAIDesc: Accelerate your creativity with AI-powered drafting and worldbuilding assistance.
about.offerCommunityDesc: Connect with a global network of readers and fellow storytellers.
about.visionContent: To become the #1 storytelling platform in the Middle East and a global leader in the creator economy.
about.visionSub: We envision a future where borders don't limit imagination, and where every creative voice from the MENA region has a seat at the global table.
about.diffEcosystemDesc: The only platform that seamlessly combines stories, a marketplace, and community.
about.diffMonetizationDesc: Writers keep the lion's share of their earnings through our transparent model.
about.diffAIDesc: We integrate technology to augment human creativity, not replace it.

guide.title: 📘 Hekayaty Platform Guide
guide.subtitle: For Writers and Readers
guide.disclaimer: The platform acts only as a technical intermediary and is not a direct party to production or shipping.

publishing.title: 1️⃣ Publishing Works
publishing.desc: Every writer can publish their works (digital books, stories, or physical products). The writer is fully responsible for the content, its accuracy, and intellectual property.

ebooks.title: 2️⃣ Digital Books (E-books)
ebooks.desc: Products are delivered digitally via the platform. Hekayaty is responsible for the delivery system only, not the content.

physical.title: 3️⃣ Physical Products
physical.subtitle: For physical products (Box Collections - Printed Books):

shippingData.title: 4️⃣ Shipping Data (Mandatory)
shippingData.desc: For physical products, you must specify: Shipping zones, costs, duration, and any special terms. Failure to provide this may lead to account suspension.

earnings.title: 5️⃣ Earnings & Payments
earnings.hold: Funds are held within the platform to secure the process.
earnings.instant: Profits are added to your balance upon confirmation.

payout.title: 6️⃣ Withdrawal (Payout)
payout.desc: You can request withdrawal anytime; funds are transferred within 24 hours via chosen payment method.

beforeBuying.title: 1️⃣ Before Buying
beforeBuying.desc: Readers must check product type (digital/physical), shipping cost, duration, and writer policy. Buying denotes agreement.

payment.title: 2️⃣ Payment
payment.desc: Payments are made via Hekayaty gateway; funds are held temporarily for security.

receival.title: 3️⃣ Receival
receival.delay: Any shipping delays are resolved with the writer directly.

legal.title: ⚖️ Important Legal Notes
legal.desc: Hekayaty is an intermediary; not responsible for content quality or shipping. Disputes resolved between parties.
legal.warning: In case of fraud or violation, account is permanently banned without compensation.

agreement.title: ✅ Agreement
agreement.desc: By using Hekayaty, you agree to all mentioned rules and warnings and pledge full compliance.

guide.title: Writer's Journey Guide
guide.copyPaste: Copy and paste your chapters from your original file into the studio. This ensures your content remains within our protected reader, making it impossible for others to download as a PDF or steal your work.
guide.chapters: Use the '+' button in the sidebar to add new chapters. Organizing your story by chapters provides a premium reading experience for your audience.
guide.save: Don't forget to save your journey! Your work is encrypted and protected by our advanced security system.

footer.aboutText: Empowering storytellers to build their worlds and share them with the universe.

legal.privacyIntro: Welcome to Hekayaty! We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. By using the platform, you agree to the collection and use of your data as described in this policy.
legal.p1_2: Content: Stories, novels, images, or any content you upload to the platform.
legal.p1_3: Activity: Log of activities, views, and interactions within the site.
legal.p2_1: To manage your account on the platform.
legal.p2_2: To facilitate the publishing and selling of your work through the platform's internal account.
legal.p2_3: To send important notifications about the account or updates.
legal.p2_4: To analyze anonymous data to improve user experience.
legal.p3_1: All data is encrypted during transport and storage.
legal.p3_2: We do not share your data with any third party unless legally required or necessary to provide the service.
legal.p3_3: We have mechanisms to prevent hacking or any unauthorized use.
legal.p4_1: Accessing your data and deleting it upon request.
legal.p4_2: Withdrawing consent to use your data at any time.
legal.p4_3: Objecting to any illegal use of data.
legal.t1_1: You are responsible for any content you upload to the platform.
legal.t1_2: Your content must not violate the rights of any third party or local and international laws.
legal.t2_1: After your first sale, you will receive a share of the profits directly according to the platform's internal account system (typically 80% for creators).
legal.t2_2: The platform reserves the right to modify profit shares, with prior notice to users before any changes.
legal.t3_1: Every user must comply with local laws regarding copyright and e-commerce.
legal.t3_2: Hekayaty is not responsible for any legal violation committed by the user outside the platform's scope.
legal.t4_1: The platform is available 'as is,' and does not assume any financial losses resulting from the use of the platform by users.
legal.t4_2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates laws or terms.
legal.t5_1: All data and assets are protected under intellectual property laws.
legal.t5_2: Any attempt to manipulate the system or fraud will lead to immediate legal action.
legal.t6_1: We reserve the right to modify this policy and terms at any time, with users informed of significant changes.
